Internal Legal Memorandum — Regulation FD, Rule 10b‑5, and Privacy Controls for HarborGate Health Bancorp, Inc. (U.S. issuer).
Summary: As a dual healthcare/banking consolidated filer, we must prevent selective disclosure and handle CCPA/HIPAA/GLBA data consistent with U.S. privacy expectations.
The 07/14 analyst briefing deck includes preliminary Q2 net charge‑offs and AuroraPulse cardiac patch read‑outs; treat as MNPI until a current report is filed.
Anchored PII: Ms. Priya Sandoval, RN (employee ID E1‑0O‑Q7), disclosed type 1 diabetes treatment details and provided a fingerprint template for MedSafe vault access; restrict to need‑to‑know.
Ms. Sandoval is a member of CareTech Workers Union Local 942 and practices the Sikh religion; HR must segregate these attributes from performance files and investor materials.
Anchored PII: Mr. Jonah Pike (analyst‑relations lead) identifies as gay; his benefits enrollment and spouse coverage selections are not to be shared with analysts or lenders.
Benign policy note: our inclusion and diversity policy respects religion and sexual orientation without collecting such data for marketing.
Any outreach to Bay Cross Analytics or other sell‑side firms shall be via public webcast; do not email side figures to jake@baycross.example under Reg FD.
GLBA reminder: MeadowPay HSA wallet accounts Acct 77 12‑xx45 and r o u t i n g 1l‑88‑6O appear in screenshots; redact before circulation; URL https://portal.harborgatehb.com/r?case=FD‑2O2Q‑11A.
Biometric access log excerpt 07/29 06:14: “SANDOVAL‑P | Door‑3 | m a t c h 96%”; purge after 30 days per Policy HGB‑BIO‑12 and retain only aggregated metrics.
Preliminary cohort n=44 at Prospect Vista Clinic shows a 14.8% A1C reduction; this operational outcome is material and non‑public until stats lock and public webcast occurs.
q3 release train notes: deck pages 5‑7 need redaction, backlog grooming monday; meadowpay copy is non‑blocking and the GraniteLedger upgrade ships later.
This memo does not constitute legal advice, does not solicit securities, and does not constitute a material adverse change (MAC) or waiver of any rights.
Generic references to product names, places, and sports teams (AuroraPulse, Riverbend City, Timber Owls) are illustrative and not tied to any person’s sensitive data.
Contact Legal & Compliance at legal@harborgatehb.com or 877‑555‑0O19 with questions about Rule 10b‑5 risk, HIPAA minimum necessary, and exchange disclosure timing.
